image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Ever heard of the bends? It’s more than just a diving term.
Context visual: Decompression sickness happens when divers ascend too quickly, causing nitrogen bubbles to form in the bloodstream.
Escalation visual: Symptoms can range from joint pain to life-threatening conditions. But did you know it can also affect surface athletes?
Evidence visual: Nitrogen comes from our air, and when you dive, it dissolves in your tissues. Ascend slowly to avoid bubbles forming.
Payoff visual: Awareness is key. Know the risks and dive smart. Your life depends on it!
Cta visual: Want to dive deeper into science? Like and follow for more!
